Container.Name: keyanu-backend
Container.Overview:
Keyanu Backend — the FastAPI API and SQLite database for the Keyanu infrastructure credential manager. Build this image from the `backend/` folder of the Keyanu repository, or point Repository at your own registry tag once you have pushed one.
This container must be reachable from the keyanu-frontend container on the same Docker network for the app to work. See the README in the unraid/ folder of the repository for full setup steps.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Stores the SQLite database and uploaded files

Config.Name: SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: Signs JWT session tokens. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: ENCRYPTION_KEY
Config.Description: Encrypts credential secrets at rest. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32. Never change this after credentials exist.

Config.Name: ADMIN_USERNAME
Config.Description: Username for the initial (single) user account

Config.Name: ADMIN_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Password for the initial admin account, created on first boot
